name: Reservoir
description: You are standing in what was once a substantial body of water and is now an expanse of drying mud. The basin retains the shape of a lake, faithfully preserving a design whose purpose has lapsed. Shores lie to the north and south, marking boundaries that no longer contain anything useful. Half-buried in the mud rests an old trunk swollen with jewels, apparently deposited here when the water receded and no one came back to check.
